manual_review_reasons: No user results submitted — comparison not yet run
Exchange adapter is STUB — live trading not possible without implementation
PnL metrics are market-dependent and cannot be reproduced exactly
reproducibility_notes: Deterministic metrics (RM gate rejection rate, IGP cooldown behavior) ARE reproducible
Stochastic metrics (win rate, PnL, Analyst outputs) are NOT reproducible across market periods
Friction rate F is semi-deterministic: gates are exact, LLM abstention varies by market context
